scripts.dev: npm run stop && concurrently -k -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "npm -w apps/server run dev" "npm -w apps/web run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173"
scripts.dev:all: npm run stop && concurrently -k -n server,camera,web -c cyan,yellow,magenta "npm -w apps/server run dev" "npm -w camera-server run dev" "npm -w apps/web run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173"
scripts.build: npm -w apps/server run build && npm -w apps/web run build
